// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.Handler<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.Handler<>));
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.IHandler<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.Handler<>));
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.Validator<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.Validator<>));
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.IValidator<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.Validator<>));
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Consumer>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
            {
                var p0 = sp.GetServices<global::TestNamespace.IHandler<global::TestNamespace.Entity1>>();
                var p1 = sp.GetServices<global::TestNamespace.IHandler<global::TestNamespace.Entity2>>().ToArray();
                var p2 = sp.GetServices<global::TestNamespace.IValidator<global::TestNamespace.Entity1>>().ToArray();
                var s0 = new global::TestNamespace.Consumer(p0, p1, p2);
                return s0;
            });
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Handler<global::TestNamespace.Entity1>, global::TestNamespace.Handler<global::TestNamespace.Entity1>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IHandler<global::TestNamespace.Entity1>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.Handler<global::TestNamespace.Entity1>>());
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Handler<global::TestNamespace.Entity2>, global::TestNamespace.Handler<global::TestNamespace.Entity2>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IHandler<global::TestNamespace.Entity2>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.Handler<global::TestNamespace.Entity2>>());
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Validator<global::TestNamespace.Entity1>, global::TestNamespace.Validator<global::TestNamespace.Entity1>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IValidator<global::TestNamespace.Entity1>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.Validator<global::TestNamespace.Entity1>>());

            return services;
        }
    }
}
